creator: rea-fbsd@codelabs.ru
text:
I am sorry to say this, but the maintainer update was submitted
at the September 28th,
  http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/139210
so this PR seems to be of no interest.

Conall, please, next time use PR search at
  http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi
prior to submitting anything -- this will enable maintainers to focus
on the real issues.

Thanks!
-- 
Eygene

 )/' _/     \   `-_,   /            #  while single-stepping the kernel.
 `-'" `"\_  ,_.-;_.-\_ ',  fsc/as   #
